figures.caption: Table 1. Dataset detailed descriptions. The dataset size is organized in (Train, Validation, Test). Forecastability is calculated by one minus the entropy of Fourier decomposition of time series [4]; a larger value indicates better predictability.
Table 4. Ablation experiment results. For each dataset, the result is the average over the four prediction lengths (96, 192, 336, 720). The best performance is in bold.
Fig. 2. Performance of ablation models on different datasets (errors for prediction length 96).
Table 2. Comparative experimental results with typical baselines. The best performance is in bold.
Table 3. Comparative experimental results with more baselines. For each dataset, the result is the average over the four prediction lengths (96, 192, 336, 720). The best performance is in bold.
